---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something for this starter
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the gap this addresses.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Does this fit a minimal starter?**
Explain why this belongs in the base starter rather than downstream projects.

**Additional context**
Any other relevant info, references, or examples.
